theme: seed rumors that flood a matrix kingdom fastest
title: Rumor Flood: Fastest-Spreading Couriers in the Matrix Kingdom
strategies: baseline: reproduce the checker's own upper-triangular unipotent shear set (pairwise commuting, linear-in-r growth)
greedy trust: copy the registry's suggested courier set verbatim without checking what subgroup it falls in

insight/search: try a small deterministic portfolio of short matrix words (products of two fixed SL2 seeds and their combinations), empirically measure each candidate's own BFS ball growth to radius r, and keep the k-subset with the largest verified flood -- i.e. certify subgroup-escape by direct growth measurement instead of trusting any single fixed recipe
invalid: emit matrices with determinant != 1 (mod p) or the wrong number of output lines
